Package microui.core.base

Class Component

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractButton, Container, RangeControl, TextArea, TextField, TextView
public abstract class Component extends ContentView
Abstract base class for all interactive UI components. Component provides comprehensive interaction handling, event management, tooltip support, and visual styling for UI elements.

Status: STABLE - Do not modify

Last Reviewed: 04.12.2025

This class serves as the foundation for all interactive UI elements and should be extended by specific component implementations.

See Also:
  • ContentView
  • Event
  • InteractionHandler
  • Tooltip

  • Constructor Details

    • Component

      public Component(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a Component with specified position and dimensions. Initializes with default theme background color and creates event, interaction handler, and tooltip systems.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the component's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the component's top-left corner
      width - the width of the component
      height - the height of the component

    • Component

      public Component()
      Constructs a Component at position (0,0) with zero dimensions. Useful when bounds will be set later.

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the component and processes interactions. This method orchestrates rendering, event detection, interaction handling, and tooltip management. It should be called every frame for active components.
      Overrides:
      draw in class ContentView

    • getBackgroundColor

      public final AbstractColor getBackgroundColor()
      Gets the background color of the component.
      Returns:
      the current background color

    • setBackgroundColor

      public final Component setBackgroundColor(AbstractColor backgroundColor)
      Sets the background color of the component.
      Parameters:
      backgroundColor - the background color to set
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if backgroundColor is null

    • isPress

      public boolean isPress()
      Checks if the component is currently being pressed (mouse button down over component).
      Returns:
      true if the component is being pressed, false otherwise

    • isRelease

      public boolean isRelease()
      Checks if the component is currently being released (mouse button up after press).
      Returns:
      true if the component is being released, false otherwise

    • isLongPress

      public boolean isLongPress()
      Checks if a long press is currently occurring on the component.
      Returns:
      true if a long press is in progress, false otherwise

    • isEnter

      public boolean isEnter()
      Checks if the mouse has just entered the component's bounds.
      Returns:
      true if the mouse just entered, false otherwise

    • isLeave

      public boolean isLeave()
      Checks if the mouse has just left the component's bounds.
      Returns:
      true if the mouse just left, false otherwise

    • isEnterLong

      public boolean isEnterLong()
      Checks if the mouse has been hovering over the component for an extended period.
      Returns:
      true if long hover is detected, false otherwise

    • isLeaveLong

      public boolean isLeaveLong()
      Checks if the mouse has left after a long hover period.
      Returns:
      true if leaving after long hover, false otherwise

    • isClick

      public boolean isClick()
      Checks if the component has just been clicked (press + release).
      Returns:
      true if just clicked, false otherwise

    • isDoubleClick

      public boolean isDoubleClick()
      Checks if the component has just been double-clicked.
      Returns:
      true if just double-clicked, false otherwise

    • isDragStart

      public boolean isDragStart()
      Checks if a drag operation has just started on the component.
      Returns:
      true if drag just started, false otherwise

    • isDragging

      public boolean isDragging()
      Checks if the component is currently being dragged.
      Returns:
      true if dragging is in progress, false otherwise

    • isDragEnd

      public boolean isDragEnd()
      Checks if a drag operation has just ended on the component.
      Returns:
      true if drag just ended, false otherwise

    • isPressed

      public boolean isPressed()
      Checks if the component is in a pressed state (mouse down over component).
      Returns:
      true if component is pressed, false otherwise

    • isReleased

      public boolean isReleased()
      Checks if the component is in a released state (not pressed).
      Returns:
      true if component is released, false otherwise

    • isHover

      public boolean isHover()
      Checks if the mouse is currently hovering over the component.
      Returns:
      true if mouse is hovering, false otherwise

    • isInteractionHandlerEnabled

      public final boolean isInteractionHandlerEnabled()
      Checks if the interaction handler is enabled for this component.
      Returns:
      true if interaction handling is enabled, false otherwise

    • setInteractionHandlerEnabled

      public final Component setInteractionHandlerEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables the interaction handler for this component. When disabled, no interaction events will be processed or triggered.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable interaction handling, false to disable
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onHover

      public final Component onHover(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for hover events (mouse over component).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when hover occurs
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onPress

      public final Component onPress(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for press events (mouse button down over component).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when pressed
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onPressed

      public final Component onPressed(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for pressed state events (continuous while pressed).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call while pressed
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onRelease

      public final Component onRelease(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for release events (mouse button up after press).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when released
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onReleased

      public final Component onReleased(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for released state events (continuous while released).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call while released
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onLongPress

      public final Component onLongPress(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for long press events (extended mouse button hold).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call on long press
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onEnter

      public final Component onEnter(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for mouse enter events (mouse enters component bounds).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when mouse enters
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onLeave

      public final Component onLeave(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for mouse leave events (mouse leaves component bounds).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when mouse leaves
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onEnterLong

      public final Component onEnterLong(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for long enter events (extended hover).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call on long hover
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onLeaveLong

      public final Component onLeaveLong(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for long leave events (mouse leaves after long hover).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when leaving after long hover
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onClick

      public final Component onClick(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for click events (press + release combination).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when clicked
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onDoubleClick

      public final Component onDoubleClick(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for double-click events (two rapid clicks).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call on double-click
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onDragStart

      public final Component onDragStart(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for drag start events (beginning of drag operation).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when drag starts
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onDragging

      public final Component onDragging(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for dragging events (continuous during drag).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call while dragging
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • onDragEnd

      public final Component onDragEnd(Listener listener)
      Registers a listener for drag end events (end of drag operation).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to call when drag ends
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • setTooltip

      public final Component setTooltip(TooltipContent tooltipContent)
      Sets the tooltip content for this component.
      Parameters:
      tooltipContent - the tooltip content to display
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • getTooltipContent

      public final TooltipContent getTooltipContent()
      Gets the current tooltip content.
      Returns:
      the current tooltip content, or null if no tooltip is set

    • setTooltip

      public final Component setTooltip(String text)
      Sets a text tooltip for this component (convenience method). Creates a TextTooltipContent with the specified text.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display in the tooltip
      Returns:
      this Component instance for method chaining

    • getTooltipText

      public final String getTooltipText()
      Gets the text from the tooltip if it is a TextTooltipContent.
      Returns:
      the tooltip text
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the current tooltip content is not a TextTooltipContent
